name: SMBC
attribution: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal by Zach Weinersmith

comics.title: Wait
comics.alt: Guess he's not buying the see-thru feel-thru corset either.

comics.title: Congrats
comics.alt: Well now I wish it were twins.

comics.title: Waiting
comics.alt: I hereby release this to Hollywood.

comics.title: Love
comics.alt: Fortunately the comic cuts off at the waist.

comics.title: Where
comics.alt: All of this is window dressing to justify panel 3.

comics.title: Philosophy
comics.alt: Actually all the apocalypses are good for philosophers, but this one is best for language analysis.

comics.title: Under
comics.alt: This is the best votey panel I will ever do.

comics.title: Machine
comics.alt: The worst thing is they're talking in binary, and the boy doesn't understand why kids at school think he's crazy.

comics.title: Rated
comics.alt: You must have a bigger humiliation fetish than me!

comics.title: Hmm
comics.alt: Confusingly, many of them grow up to dislike Batman.

comics.title: Sci fi
comics.alt: If Ai destroys the world because we wrote stories about it, we will at least have the funniest possible apocalypse.

comics.title: Holy
comics.alt: God keeps trying to evolve primates to be more repulsive to each other and they just keep finding it hotter.

comics.title: Learn
comics.alt: The alternative was artisanal soap biiiiiitch.

comics.title: Invisible
comics.alt: The baby also goes to jail and has the cutest little orange jumpsuit.

comics.title: Hooray
comics.alt: I need to do a collection of just comics containing the word Hooray.

comics.title: Pumpkin
comics.alt: Actually there's probably a medieval German version that makes this one look pleasant.

comics.title: Curses
comics.alt: Batman would've just reached for his utility belt.

comics.title: Wow
comics.alt: Still better than the time I got divorced via a pop-up book.

comics.title: Serve
comics.alt: I need to do an upbeat comic week one of these days. They all end with hooray.

comics.title: Good Cop
comics.alt: The other option is good cop, cop pretending to be a fish on the floor that keeps flopping around but won't die.
